subject: Close VID's plain text port 30238
commit_message:
Close VID's plain text port 30238

* Move robot's health-check to https
* Expose 8080 on ClusterIP only

Issue-ID: VID-496
Issue-ID: OJSI-119

Change-Id: Iac5580261692576e523966945db619bff560b3e6
Signed-off-by: Ittay Stern <ittay.stern@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
Topic set to VID's plain text port

Patch Set 2:

This is one of 3 coordinated commits.

(1)
The VID port-change was checked manually by me, but could not get robot's verification, as the robot health-check change itself is needed to verify it.

(2)
The robot health-check change was blessed by Brian:

```
Ittay,

We found the problem in SO and were able to successfully use robot via HTTPS/8443 to VID for instantiateVFWCL and Health check.

integration_robot_properties.py:#GLOBAL_VID_SERVER_PROTOCOL = 'http'
integration_robot_properties.py:#GLOBAL_VID_SERVER_PORT = '8080'
integration_robot_properties.py:GLOBAL_VID_SERVER_PROTOCOL = 'https'
integration_robot_properties.py:GLOBAL_VID_SERVER_PORT = '8443'

So we can make a coordinated change in testsuite and VID whenever you are ready.

Brian
```
